RUNESMITH2-AMP_POWER.title: Amp

RUNESMITH2-GRINDSTONE_POWER.description: This turn, whenever you play a card, [gold]Upgrade[/gold] it. If the card cannot be [gold]Upgraded[/gold], [gold]Enhance[/gold] it instead.

RUNESMITH2-GRINDSTONE_POWER.title: Grindstone
RUNESMITH2-ICE_COLD_POWER.description:
Creatures with [gold]Ice-Cold[/gold] has reduced attack damage.
[gold]Ice-Cold[/gold] is reduced by half at the end of turn.
RUNESMITH2-ICE_COLD_POWER.smartDescripti:
{OnPlayer:Your|[gold]{OwnerName}'s[/gold]} attack damage is reduced by [blue]{Amount}[/blue].
[gold]Ice-Cold[/gold] is reduced by [blue]{Decrement}[/blue] at the end of {OnPlayer:your|[gold]{OwnerName}'s[/gold]} turn.
RUNESMITH2-ICE_COLD_POWER.title: Ice-Cold
RUNESMITH2-LASER_TURRET_POWER.descriptio: Whenever you gain {elements:rs2Icon(all)}, deal damage to ALL enemies equal to [blue]1[/blue] times the number of {elements:rs2Icon(all)} gained.
